mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_agent_message (message_id, match_id, speaker, content, created_at) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{matchId}, #{speaker}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE match_agent_message SET message_id = #{messageId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM match_agent_message WHERE match_id = #{matchId}
